I

IMG_PATH - Static variable in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Card image base path inside resources.
initData(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Receives the machine count from the selection screen, creates the Game and GameTimer, sets up the layout, deals the initial hands, and starts the general timer.
initialize() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
 
instance - Static variable in class com.example._0tazo.view.SceneManager
 
InvalidTurnException(String, String) - Constructor for exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.InvalidTurnException
Constructs an InvalidTurnException identifying who acted out of turn and whose turn it actually is.
IPlayer - Interface in com.example._0tazo.model
Contract that every player in the Cincuentazo game must fulfill, regardless of whether they are human or computer-controlled.
isActive() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.AbstractPlayer
Returns true if this player is still active in the game.
isActive() - Method in interface com.example._0tazo.model.IPlayer
Returns true if this player is still active in the game.
isAtLimit() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Table
Returns true if the current sum has reached or exceeded the maximum allowed value of 50.
isCardPlayable(Card) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Table
Returns true if playing the given card would keep the table sum at or below 50.
isDiscardPileEmpty() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Deck
Returns true if the discard pile contains no cards.
isFaceUp() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
 
isFaceUpDraw() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.ComputerPlayer
Computer player always draws cards face down.
isFaceUpDraw() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.HumanPlayer
Human player always draws cards face up.
isFaceUpDraw() - Method in interface com.example._0tazo.model.IPlayer
Determines whether cards drawn by this player are dealt face up.
isGameOver() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
 
isGeneralRunning() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Returns true if the general timer is currently running and not paused.
isMachineTimerRunning() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Returns true if the machine turn timer is currently active.
isMainDeckEmpty() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Deck
Returns true if the main deck contains no cards.
isPlayable(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
Returns true if playing this card would keep the table sum at or below 50, given the current sum.
ITimerListener - Interface in com.example._0tazo.utilities
Callback interface that receives timer events from GameTimer.
